case_title: PEREZ-RODRIGUEZ, SAMUEL VS COLONIAL PENN INSURANCE ATTN LUCIA RAZ CLAIM ADJUS

docket_entries.description: CASE SENT TO JUDGE QUIDACHAY FOR MOCK TRIAL.
CERT MAIL TO COLONIAL INS. CLAIM ADJUSTER RETURNED SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,274.68 FILED BY PEREZ-RODRIGUEZ, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT COLONIAL PENN INSURANCE ATTN LUCIA RAZ CLAIM ADJUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ-RODRIGUEZ, SAMUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLONIAL PENN INSURANCE ATTN LUCIA RAZ CLAIM ADJUS DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF SUING AND SERVING THE PROPER DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
